name: Blueberry-Banana Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup blueberry pie filling (made from fresh blueberries)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cream cheese and sugar; beat at high speed with an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
2. Spread the mixture evenly in the bottom of the cooled pastry shell.
3. Arrange banana slices on top of the cream cheese layer.
4. Spread pie filling over the bananas.
5. Top with whipped cream.
6. Chill.
